library_preparation_preflight.summary: io.circe:circe-generic_3 is a pure Scala 3 generic codec-derivation module; the resolved artifact brings its required runtime dependencies transitively and meaningful coverage is reachable with in-memory Json encoding/decoding tests.
library_preparation_preflight.agent_guidance: No environment variables or system properties are required. Tests should stay pure/in-memory and exercise Scala 3 generic derivation APIs such as semiauto deriveEncoder/deriveDecoder/deriveCodec and auto derivation. Avoid relying on io.circe.parser unless the test intentionally adds parser coverage, since parsing is a separate circe module and is not required for circe-generic coverage.
risks: The existing failure is caused by test source API drift: Json.asAccumulating is not present in circe 0.15.0-M1, so generated fixes should adapt the test code rather than add setup.
circe-parser is commonly used in applications but is not required to cover circe-generic itself; adding it would broaden scope unless parser-specific behavior is intentionally tested.

input_evidence.name: issue
